history.text: [Year 1] The town of Hope's Peak was founded by 10 brave souls.
[Year 1] Mo Yi is among the founders.

[Year 1] Construction of a Farm has begun (4 builder-days).
[Year 1] Construction of a Cottage has begun (4 builder-days).
[Year 1] ELECTION: Tie Zhu has been elected Mayor with 7 of 10 votes!
